testsuite.name: com.example.stockapp.config.ConfigManagerTest

testcase.name: resetToDefaults writes DEFAULT_HOST and DEFAULT_PORT then calls apply
getApiPort returns DEFAULT_PORT when not configured
isValidPort returns true for valid port numbers
isValidPort returns false for invalid port values
getApiHost returns DEFAULT_HOST when not configured

testsuite.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build what is described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\jerome.gouez\.gradle\caches\8.9\transforms\42dcda44876977c8e18f9f651726c538\transformed\jetified-byte-buddy-agent-1.15.4.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
